title: Lattice YAML Schema
description: JSON Schema for .lattice.yaml files — the declarative definition format for Lattice context graphs. A Lattice connects Datasets and Modules into executable workflows with FAIR metadata.

name.description: URL-safe lattice identifier. Lowercase, underscores allowed, no spaces.

version.description: Semantic version (semver) of this lattice definition.

lattice_type.description: Classification of the lattice. Maps to vault ontology discriminator. Pipeline = deterministic DAG of modules. Agent = LLM-driven reasoning (from AgentMode). Context_graph = knowledge structure. Workflow = operational process.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this lattice does and its scientific/operational purpose.

execution.description: Execution configuration. Maps to repo AgentMode enum (objects/agents/modes.py) and tier system.

mode.description: Execution mode. Aligned with AgentMode enum: workflow (deterministic DAG), reasoning (LLM-driven), hybrid (mixed).

model.description: Default model for reasoning nodes. Per-node model_override takes precedence.

runtime.description: Target runtime environment. 'ray' for distributed execution (L2/L3), 'local' for single-machine (L1), 'kubernetes' for orchestrated (L3).

tier.description: Compute tier. L1=Edge/Local, L2=Regional/Cluster, L3=Cloud/HPC. Maps to repo deploy tier system.

nodes.description: Ordered list of nodes in the lattice graph. Each node represents a dataset, module, processing step, or reasoning step. Maps to AgentNode dataclass (objects/agents/nodes.py).

id.description: Unique node identifier within this lattice. Maps to AgentNode.id.

type.description: Node type. Aligned with AgentNodeType enum (objects/agents/modes.py). Module=reference to a Lattice module. Dataset=reference to a Lattice dataset. Process=generic processing step. Reasoning=LLM reasoning step (hybrid/reasoning mode).

ref.description: Reference to a vault record (wikilink path) or external URI. Used for module and dataset nodes to link to their registry entry.

config.description: Optional configuration overrides for this node. Keys are parameter names, values are parameter values. Maps to AgentNode.config.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this node does in the lattice.

prompt.description: Prompt template for reasoning nodes. Supports {variable} interpolation from upstream node outputs. Maps to AgentNode.prompt. Only applicable when type=reasoning.

model_override.description: Override the lattice's default model for this specific reasoning node. Maps to AgentNode.model_override. Only applicable when type=reasoning.

edges.description: Directed edges defining data flow between nodes. Uses explicit edge list (graph-native) rather than per-node depends_on (code-side pattern). Maps to AgentEdge dataclass (objects/agents/nodes.py). Note: AgentEdge uses source/target internally but serializes as from/to.

from.description: Source node ID. Maps to AgentEdge.source.

to.description: Target node ID. Maps to AgentEdge.target.

port.description: Named port for multi-output nodes. Disambiguates which output of the source node feeds into the target.

label.description: Human-readable edge label for documentation and visualization. Maps to AgentEdge.label.

data_mapping.description: Explicit mapping of source outputs to target inputs. Keys are source output names, values are target input names. Maps to AgentEdge.data_mapping.

condition.description: Condition expression for conditional edges. Edge is only traversed when condition evaluates to true. Maps to AgentEdge.condition.

fair.description: FAIR metadata block. Required for marketplace compliance and reproducibility. Maps to ObjectMetadata fields (objects/metadata.py).

license.description: SPDX license identifier. Maps to ObjectMetadata.license.

creators.description: List of creator names or identifiers. Maps to ObjectMetadata.creators.

keywords.description: Semantic tags for findability (FAIR F4). Maps to ObjectMetadata.keywords.

identifier.description: Digital Object Identifier or persistent ID (FAIR F1). Maps to ObjectMetadata.doi.

provenance.description: Free-text provenance description: origin, derivation, methodology. Maps to ObjectMetadata.provenance.

federation.description: Federation metadata for cross-instance sharing and composition.

shareable.description: Whether this lattice can be shared with other aDNA instances.

source_instance.description: Identifier of the aDNA instance that originated this lattice.

parent_lattice.description: Name of the lattice this was extracted from (for sub-lattice extraction).

version_policy.description: How this lattice tracks upstream version changes. locked=pinned, patch/minor=auto-update within range, latest=always latest.

extracted_nodes.description: Node IDs extracted from parent_lattice. All listed IDs must exist in this lattice's nodes array.
